topic.what: Multi-agent virtual customer assistant for cybersecurity troubleshooting with tri-context personalization
topic.how: Coordinates specialized agents integrating device-level evidence collection, implicit user proficiency profiling, and proactive context-aware recommendations
topic.why_matters: Improves diagnostic accuracy from 50% to 90.9%, reduces user burden, and enables cost-effective self-service support below human IT benchmarks

characteristics.what_it_measures: Proportion of conversations reaching correct resolution
Mean reciprocal rank of correct solution product categories
User preference for SecMate over human IT support
characteristics.context: Bottom-line acceptance metric aligned with TAM

characteristics.what_it_measures: LLM API cost per troubleshooting session
characteristics.context: vs human IT service desk benchmarks

characteristics.what_it_measures: Total session duration including API latency and user interaction
Error reduction in proficiency estimation after initial prompts
characteristics.evidence: ProfiLLM taxonomy applied in interactive pipeline
characteristics.context: MAE dropped within 2-3 user prompts across 23 subdomains

novelty: Tri-context personalization unifying device, user, and service specificity in single multi-agent VCA
Clue Collector agent providing real-time device-level evidence grounding for diagnosis
Implicit user proficiency profiling embedded in interactive troubleshooting pipeline
End-to-end evaluation of recommendation-augmented VCA with LLM-generated rationale layer
open_problems: Generalizing to diverse populations across ages, occupations, and expertise levels
Benchmarking against existing methods (no comparable multi-agent VCAs exist)
Reducing LLM overhead via smaller or specialized models while maintaining quality
Integration with organization-specific RAG knowledge and HITL escalation mechanisms
